theme_archetype.storefront: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Light Theme) - Clean canvas for streetwear apparel, high-contrast typography, electric indigo accents.
theme_archetype.admin: Archetype 2: Performance Pro (Dark Theme) - Dense data, dark-first, minimal visual noise for backend operational management.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous on storefront (p-8, p-12), dense on admin (p-4, p-6).
layout_and_spacing.storefront_grid: Bento grid for hero/lookbook sections (Tetris mode), 4-column Shein-style minimal grid for product catalog.
layout_and_spacing.admin_grid: Control Room grid. Dense sidebar + header + 3-4 column widget grid. Use grid borders to expose technical skeleton.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Sharp edges (rounded-none) or very subtle (rounded-sm) to fit the edgy streetwear aesthetic.

components.navigation: Sticky white header with crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80). Logo left, Categories center (hidden on mobile), Actions right (Search, Favorites, Cart).
components.logo: Text-based HTML composition: bold black 'NABI' + star icon + 'MEN' in text-[#4338CA] on the bottom row. No image placeholder.
components.product_card: Minimalist. Image takes 80% height with group-hover:scale-105 transition. Information below: Brand, Title, Price in PYG, minimal 'Add to Cart' / 'Favorite' icon overlays on image.
components.product_detail_modal: Half-and-half layout. Left: Image carousel. Right: Sticky details, Size/Color pill selectors, big sticky 'Add to Cart' button.
components.cart_sidebar: Shadcn Sheet component. Shows items, subtotal, and heavy 'Checkout via WhatsApp' button. Form asks for Name & Location before redirect.
components.admin_sidebar: Dark slate sidebar, active state highlighted with 1px border and glowing left border (tracing beam).
components.admin_tables: Shadcn tables. High contrast text. Use badges for order states (En proceso, Pagado parcialmente, etc.).
components.file_manager: Windows-explorer style grid. Folder icons, drag-and-drop zone using standard div+events or react-dropzone. Breadcrumb navigation.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Images zoom slightly (scale-105). Buttons invert colors or show soft drop-shadow.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Smooth scrolling via Lenis. Staggered fade-up for product grids.
motion_and_interaction.micro_interactions: Heart icon fill animation when favorited.

hero_main.description: Urban streetwear model for hero lookbook

hero_secondary.description: Stylish woman in urban street for secondary bento box

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the storefront and admin panel as completely separate layout wrappers to easily manage the Light/Dark theme division.
Do NOT use generic placeholders (like via.placeholder.com). Use the provided image_urls for seeding the products grid.
Ensure all buttons, form inputs, and key interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes in kebab-case (e.g. data-testid='add-to-cart-btn').

For the custom WhatsApp checkout: calculate the cart total in Guaranies (PYG) based on a mockup exchange rate (or state context), show a form for User Name and Location (CDE/Others), and generate a wa.me URL with pre-filled text.

Admin Dashboard: Implement a dummy dark-mode UI with a sidebar. Show Products, Orders (with states: en proceso, pagado parcialmente, en envío, arribado, completado, cancelado), Files (Windows-explorer look), and Dashboard (charts using Recharts).
Files Manager: Use a grid of folder/file icons. Make it look like a web-based Windows explorer.
Use Phosphor icons (@phosphor-icons/react) or Lucide (lucide-react) for a clean, sharp look across the app.
